title: Field Guide to Risk Assessment
summary: A 120-page practitioner handbook covering hazard identification, risk matrices, ALARP reasoning and residual-risk reporting — with worked examples across five industries.

title: NEBOSH IGC — Consolidated Study Notes
summary: Element-by-element condensed notes for IG1 and IG2, mapped to the current NEBOSH syllabus. Includes a question-type cheat sheet.

title: IOSH Managing Safely — Sample Paper
summary: A full 40-question sample assessment with model answers, timing guidance and common examiner pitfalls.

title: HACCP Kitchen Daily Checklist
summary: A printable one-pager — temperature checks, allergen controls, hand-wash compliance, closing log.

title: ISO 45001 Implementation Handbook
summary: A 90-day implementation roadmap from gap-assessment to stage-2 audit. Includes a risk register template and audit-plan generator.

title: OTHM Level 6 — Assignment Question Bank
summary: Past-style assignment questions with grading rubrics and distinction-band exemplars, for candidates and internal verifiers.

title: Corporate Training Capability Deck
summary: For L&D and procurement teams — our delivery model, awarding-body approvals, reporting dashboards and case studies.

title: 2026 Qualifications Brochure
summary: Every EIOSH programme, cohort calendar, fee schedule and awarding-body approval — 64 pages.

title: ESG Disclosure — Primer for Operations Teams
summary: A 24-page briefing on TCFD, ISSB S1/S2 and what the materiality assessment means for HSE, facilities and supply-chain leads.

title: Fire Risk Assessment Template
summary: An editable template aligned to PAS 79 and GCC Civil Defence expectations — with worked example for a mid-size office.

title: First Aid Incident Log
summary: A compliant incident log for nominated first aiders, covering patient details, care provided and handover.

title: Behavioural Safety Playbook
summary: A field playbook on designing observation programmes, coaching conversations and leading-indicator dashboards.
